center.name: 比哈尔邦
center.summary: 比哈尔邦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括白鹤、赤颈鹤，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Volume 2|page=138|publisher= Smithsonian Institution and Lynx Edicions}} The western population winters in Iran and some individuals formerly wintered in India south to Nagpur and east to Bihar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=1998|title= Mammals, birds and reptiles of Dibru-Saikhowa Sanctuary, Assam, India|journal= Oryx|volume= 32|issue= 3|pages= 192–200|doi=10.1017/S0030605300029951|doi-access= free}} and are no longer found in the state of Bihar
